label: DeFi Pool Activity
description: AMM swap and LP-style activity table for DeFi venues showing pool, size, price impact, and fees.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary via widget-wrapper.tsx ✓. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[markets-data] ✓. 0.3 availableOn=[markets] ✓. 0.4 No any/@ts-ignore ✓. 0.5 No lib/mocks imports in widget file ✓. 0.6 FIXED — added isLoading prop to LiveFeedWidget. 0.7 isEmpty={isNotDefi || rows.length === 0} ✓. 0.8 FIXED — added error/onRetry props to LiveFeedWidget. 0.9 No dead code ✓.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data from useMarketsData().orderFlowData and assetClass — no inline fetch/import ✓. 1.2 Context calls useGlobalScope() + getStrategyIdsForScope() ✓. 1.3–1.5 ownOrders filtered by scopeStrategyIds in context; orderFlowData not scope-filtered (market-wide data, not per-org) — appropriate for market feed. 1.6 Empty scope → all market orders shown ✓. 1.7 No reference data in widget file; mock generators in lib/mocks/ via context (context is READ ONLY) ✓.

findings: Price impact (0.25%) and gas (35 gwei) are hardcoded constants — flagged for L4/L5 when real AMM feed is wired.
Footer note references `useLiveBook` — reminder that real venue feed wiring is pending.
